verses.1: “Arise, shine; for your light has come,
verses.2: For behold, darkness will cover the earth,
verses.3: Nations will come to your light,
verses.4: “Lift up your eyes all around, and see:
verses.5: Then you shall see and be radiant,
verses.6: A multitude of camels will cover you,
verses.7: All the flocks of Kedar will be gathered together to you.
verses.8: “Who are these who fly as a cloud,
verses.9: Surely the islands will wait for me,
verses.11: Your gates also shall be open continually; they shall not be shut day nor night, that men may bring to you the wealth of the nations, and their kings led captive.
verses.12: For that nation and kingdom that will not serve you shall perish; yes, those nations shall be utterly wasted.
verses.13: “The glory of Lebanon shall come to you, the cypress tree, the pine, and the box tree together, to beautify the place of my sanctuary; and I will make the place of my feet glorious.
verses.14: The sons of those who afflicted you will come bowing to you;
verses.15: “Whereas you have been forsaken and hated,
verses.16: You will also drink the milk of the nations,
verses.17: For bronze I will bring gold;
verses.18: Violence shall no more be heard in your land,
verses.19: The sun will be no more your light by day,
verses.20: Your sun will not go down any more,
verses.21: Then your people will all be righteous.
verses.22: The little one will become a thousand,
